description.en: Supports subculture-themed ID generation. Features multiple preprocessing methods (traditionalization, Martian text, pinyin mapping, and Leet decoration), preset prefix/suffix configurations, and customizable admin settings.
description.zh: 支持生成次文化特色 ID。提供繁体化、火星文、拼音化、Leetspeak 装饰等多种预处理方式，支持预设前后缀和管理员自定义词库配置。
